ai_director_reasoning.partner_comment: My partner accurately matched each basket based on my descriptions, confirmed placements clearly, and only asked clarification when an item could be ambiguous (e.g., the tub basket in round 2 and the oval basket in round 4). They consistently reflected back key identifying features, which reduced mistakes and kept the ordering efficient. Communication stayed smooth across rounds and they adjusted well whenever I added extra distinguishing details.

ai_matcher_reasoning.partner_comment: The director gave clear, distinctive descriptions for each basket (shape, color, handles, lids) and responded well to clarifying questions (e.g., differentiating the tub basket and the deeper vs shallow oval). Communication stayed consistent across rounds and got a bit more precise when ambiguity came up.
